name: Oriental Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and peel the shrimp, leaving the tail intact if desired, and remove the vein.
2. Wash and pat the shrimp dry.
3. Stir-fry the shrimp in hot oil until cooked, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Remove the shrimp from the wok and drain the oil.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the wok; heat to boiling.
6. Return the shrimp to the wok; cover and cook for 30 seconds.
